channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: O/s 95 Brondesbury Villas, 11th July
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Dog waste here, 11th July
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Aylesbury Road, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Scaffolding not taken down since January, 11th July
item.description:
Scalfolding on property- since January 2025 - following a flood in upstairs property - the scalfolding has still not been taken down

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Daniel Gardens, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Items dumped in alleyway, 11th July
item.description:
Items have been left in alleyway at the back of the middle row of houses.

item.title: Broken Street Lighting, 11th July

item.title: 79 Glengarry dumped rubbish, 11th July
item.description:
Please address issue of residents at 79 Glengarry Rd obstructing pavement with dumped rubbish every week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 79, Glengarry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree - too large for area, 11th July
item.description:
Residents are concerned about the roots of the tree causing damage to the one bedroom flats and causing damage to the pavement / car parking area - which is all uneven, breaking.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Daniel Gardens, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Appears to be stolen or abandoned vehicle, 11th July
item.description:
On monday, I noticed vehicle driver side passenger at rear door was left opened. Assumed someone may have left it parked in error. However, today I noticed both wing mirrors are damaged, fuel door open and inside car not clean.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hewish Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile up of rubbish, 11th July
item.description:
This rubbish needs removing, it’s a health hazard

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Limes Avenue, Southgate

item.title: Graffiti outside Dalston Junction overground station, 11th July
item.description:
Been there a week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Multiple potholes on street, 11th July
item.description:
Despite evidence of multiple repairs, the street is full of potholes - dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Daniel Gardens, Old Kent Road, Greater London

item.title: Between 29 and 31 plympton road, 11th July
item.description:
The tree is extremely dry and needs watering. i’ve seen other trees with a water bag seem to be coping better with the heat.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plympton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Helium Gas Canisters, 11th July
item.description:
A quantity of Helium Gas Canisters dumped between the green electricity boxes opposite Southern Tyres. Please have removed asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Heversham Road, Upper Belvedere, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
